segments.speaker: JAN
segments.en: Excellent!
segments.zh: 太棒了！我特别想学会做椅子。

segments.speaker: JAN
segments.en: I'd love to be able to make chairs.

segments.speaker: JAN
segments.en: That sounds like fun.
segments.zh: 听起来挺有意思的。什么时候？

segments.speaker: JAN
segments.en: When is it?

segments.speaker: JAN
segments.en: I should think I'll come home the same day.
segments.zh: 我觉得我当天就能回来。嗯，我当然很想加入这个小组。

segments.speaker: JAN
segments.en: Well, I'd certainly like to join the group.

segments.speaker: LOU MILLER
segments.en: So, hello everyone.
segments.zh:
大家好，我是卢·米勒，今天由我担任你们的导游，带大家乘船游览塔斯马尼亚海岸。出发前，我想先跟大家说说这次行程的一些情况。
大家可以看到，我们的船不算大。船上已经有三位工作人员，此外还能再搭载十五位乘客——也就是你们——沿着海岸线游览。但请注意，如果船的任何一侧超过九个人，我们会请一些人挪到另一边，否则我们十八个人都得掉进海里！
我们最近升级了所有船只。以前是纯黑色的，现在新船换上了舒适的深红色座椅和浅绿色外壳，这样既能与众不同，也有助于宣传公司。这让我们的船看起来挺独特的，你们觉得呢？
旅途中我们会免费提供午餐盒，有三种选择：午餐盒1是火腿番茄三明治，午餐盒2是切达奶酪卷，午餐盒3是沙拉配鸡蛋和金枪鱼。所有午餐盒里都有一包薯片和一块巧克力棒。请告诉工作人员你想要哪种。
我想不用我提醒大家不要把任何东西扔进海里。船上没有垃圾桶，但午餐后，杰西、我或者另一位导游雷会来收集垃圾，统一放进一个大塑料袋里。

segments.speaker: LOU MILLER
segments.en: My name's Lou Miller and I'm going to be your tour guide today as we take this fantastic boat trip around the Tasmanian coast.

segments.speaker: LOU MILLER
segments.en: Before we set off, I just want to tell you a few things about our journey.

segments.speaker: LOU MILLER
segments.en: Our boats aren't huge as you can see.

segments.speaker: LOU MILLER
segments.en: We already have three staff members on board and on top of that, we can transport a further fifteen people – that's you – around the coastline.

segments.speaker: LOU MILLER
segments.en: But please note if there are more than nine people on either side of the boat, we'll move some of you over, otherwise all eighteen of us will end up in the sea!

segments.speaker: LOU MILLER
segments.en: We've recently upgraded all our boats.

segments.speaker: LOU MILLER
segments.en: They used to be jet black, but our new ones now have these comfortable dark red seats and a light-green exterior in order to stand out from others and help promote our company.

segments.speaker: LOU MILLER
segments.en: This gives our boats a rather unique appearance, don't you think?

segments.speaker: LOU MILLER
segments.en: We offer you a free lunchbox during the trip and we have three types.

segments.speaker: LOU MILLER
segments.en: Lunchbox 1 contains ham and tomato sandwiches.

segments.speaker: LOU MILLER
segments.en: Lunchbox 2 contains a cheddar cheese roll and Lunchbox 3 is salad-based and also contains eggs and tuna.

segments.speaker: LOU MILLER
segments.en: All three lunchboxes also have a packet of crisps and chocolate bar inside.

segments.speaker: LOU MILLER
segments.en: Please let staff know which lunchbox you prefer.

segments.speaker: LOU MILLER
segments.en: I'm sure I don't have to ask you to not throw anything into the sea.

segments.speaker: LOU MILLER
segments.en: We don't have any bins to put litter in, but Jess, myself or Ray, our other guide, will collect it from you after lunch and put it all in a large plastic sack.

items.prompt: What is the maximum number of people who can stand on each side of the boat?

pairs.q: maximum number of people who can stand on each side
pairs.p: more than nine people on either side
pairs.note: 'more than nine' 表示超过9人，即最大为9人，与题干'最大人数'对应。

paraphrase.explain: 定位句提到'if there are more than nine people on either side of the boat, we'll move some of you over'，说明每侧最多9人，因此答案选A（9）。

items.prompt: What colour are the tour boats?

pairs.note: 题干问颜色，原文直接给出颜色词 light-green。

paraphrase.explain: 定位句提到 'light-green exterior'，直接对应题干问的 boat 颜色。

items.prompt: Which lunchbox is suitable for someone who doesn't eat meat or fish?

pairs.note: 题干说'不吃肉或鱼'，原文提到午餐盒3含鸡蛋和金枪鱼（鱼），所以不适合；而午餐盒2只有奶酪卷，符合要求。

paraphrase.explain: 题干问'不吃肉或鱼的人适合哪个午餐盒'，原文列出三种午餐盒内容，午餐盒2只有奶酪卷，不含肉或鱼，因此是答案。

items.prompt: What should people do with their litter?

pairs.note: 题干问如何处理垃圾，原文说不要扔进海里，暗示正确做法是交给工作人员。
原文直接出现'litter'，与题干关键词一致。

paraphrase.explain: 定位句提到'not throw anything into the sea'和'collect it from you'，说明垃圾不能扔海里，而是由工作人员收集，对应选项B。

items.prompt: Which TWO features of the lighthouse does Lou mention?
Which TWO features of the lighthouse does Lou mention?
Which TWO types of creature might come close to the boat?
Which TWO types of creature might come close to the boat?
Which TWO points does Lou make about the caves?
Which TWO points does Lou make about the caves?
